positive: Stylized minimalist artwork of a floating forest ecosystem viewed from above, featuring bioluminescent flora, interconnected root systems, and a central, majestic glowing tree. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau linework and modern scientific illustration, rendered with high contrast black ink lines on a muted, parchment-toned background. The color palette is limited to deep emerald, electric teal, and glowing amber highlights against the dark forest silhouette. The composition must be perfectly centered and balanced for a square print, emphasizing clean silhouettes and graphic readability. Overhead perspective, vector art quality, highly detailed linework, 8K, concept art, negative space optimized.
